Name: Crow's Laughter
Description: The werewolf spreads their jaws wide and directs a laugh of such derision at their target that the subject must exert all their will not to lose their temper. Whatever insecurities the target harbors rise to the fore, and self-control crumbles in their desire to shut the heckler up. Garou can use the Gift to distract a foe by drawing their attention, or as a desperate means to embolden packmates or other allies. A crow-spirit grants this Gift.
System: The Gift must target a subject within sight and hearing of the user. The ragabash attacks the target in a Gift vs Composure + Insight conflict to cause superficial Willpower damage. A target successfully subjected to this Gift must then direct their attention and attacks at the user, unless they spend a point of Willpower to resist this urge. This Gift can also be used in homid form.
